DEFAULT.$description: A default border color used for standard borders, dividers, and strokes.

strong.$description: A strong border color used for high-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

muted.$description: A muted border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

primary.$description: A primary border color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key elements.

announcement.$description: An accent border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting accent elements.

info.$description: A informational border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting info elements.

danger.$description: A danger border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting danger elements.

warning.$description: A warning border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting warning elements.

success.$description: A success border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting success elements.

neutral.$description: A neutral border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers

disabled.$description: A border color used to indicate disabled states or non-interactive surfaces.
